case_title: RICHARD HARDACK VS. HSBC BANK US NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $820.00 FILED BY HARDACK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK US NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DEFENDANT HSBC BAMK US NATIONAL ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MEILING ELSNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
